codeReview.summary: Reviewed the final feature commit and both worker handoffs. The implementation cleanly fixes repeated settings-tab listener binding, factors the settings save branching into a shared planner, and centralizes unrecoverable 401 handling across read/write paths. I did not find a correctness issue that blocks the feature’s stated settings/auth/config behavior.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Isolated-worktree validation for frontend features still depends on manually copying integrations/browser-use-discovery/state/worker-config.json; the documented worker procedure and repo bootstrap do not provision that clean-worktree prerequisite.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff /Users/emilionunezgarcia/.factory/missions/62d73272-e50b-4b4e-89d1-be82508ac1ac/handoffs/2026-04-11T06-11-58-945Z__settings-auth-and-config-flows__ef948469-b688-497b-aad5-fb00775c1630.json shows test:repo failed in /tmp/job-bored-settings-auth-worktree until integrations/browser-use-discovery/state/worker-config.json was copied in; /Users/emilionunezgarcia/Job-Bored/.factory/init.sh only installs deps and creates .factory/library, so it never bootstraps that file.

summary: Pass. The reviewed commit 4dc35031534761e62b419ef13741890ad200e5d8 appears complete for the settings/auth/config stabilization scope, and I found no blocking or non-blocking code defects in the implementation itself. One shared-state gap remains around isolated-worktree bootstrap for browser-use-discovery validation.
